data.title: EX.IO Partners with Payment Asia, Joining Hands to Support Hong Kong's Licensed Stablecoin Ecosystem
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 10, 2026, EX.IO, a prominent licensed digital asset trading platform, revealed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Payment Asia, a comprehensive electronic payment platform. The collaborative effort aims to delve into and enhance payment and custody services.

data.title: Wrap Lands Major Pre-Order for Over 20 Drone and Counter-Drone Systems, Advancing Expansion Across the U.K. and Europe
data.description: The recent purchase indicates a rising demand for counter-unmanned aircraft system (C-UAS) capabilities internationally, with public safety agencies increasingly seeking non-lethal solutions to address modern threats. This points to a significant market opportunity as the need for such technologies continues to grow.
Announcement: KH Group Plc's AGM scheduled with attendees requested. Keep an eye out for more details.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Trade Flat Despite Over $400M In ETF Inflows
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading at around $72,000, with Bitcoin ETFs experiencing $343.3 million in net inflows on Thursday. Additionally, Ethereum ETFs recorded $85.2 million in net inflows. The latest cryptocurrency ticker prices are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $71,913.67, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $2,197.31, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $83.39, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $1.33, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.09227, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.055886. The meme coin market capitalization has increased by 0.5% to $34 billion within the past 24 hours. Notably, crypto chart analyst Ali shared their insights on the current market trends. For more details, the full story can be accessed on the Benzinga website.

data.title: SOLOWIN HOLDINGS Announces Participation in Libeara’s Funding Round to Accelerate Growth of the Tokenization Ecosystem
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 10, 2026, Solowin Holdings (Nasdaq: AXG) revealed that its venture arm, AlloyX Ventures Limited, has taken part in the latest funding round for Libeara Pte. Ltd., a regulated real-world asset tokenization platform. This move is aimed at enhancing ecosystem synergies and progressing tokenization efforts in Asia and worldwide. The partnership between AlloyX Limited, a subsidiary of AXG, and Libeara resulted in the launch of RYT, a tokenized money market fund created using AXG’s AI-driven tokenization service platform, FERION.

data.title: Viking Therapeutics to Participate at Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Viking Therapeutics, Inc. ("Viking") disclosed its plans to participate in various forthcoming events. Viking, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol VKTX, specializes in creating innovative treatments for metabolic and endocrine conditions. This announcement signifies the company's proactive engagement in the field.

data.title: Leeds Equity Partners Closes Latest Private Equity Fund at $1.9 Billion, Surpassing its Fund Target
data.description: Leeds Equity Partners, a private equity firm, recently declared the completion of fundraising for Leeds Equity Partners VIII, L.P. ("Leeds VIII"), along with its parallel investment entities. The fund secured around $1.9 billion in total commitments.
Hillman Group receives prestigious 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces Award for excellence in workplace culture.

data.title: Cineplex Reports Strong March Box Office Results
data.description: In Toronto on April 10, 2026, the leading entertainment and media company in Canada, Cineplex (TSX: CGX), disclosed that they had earned $52.4 million in box office revenues for March 2026.
Treasury Bonds RIKB 27 0415 and RIKB 38 0215 auction outcome announced with surprising numbers.

data.title: Watsco Schedules First Quarter Conference Call On Tuesday, April 28, 2026
data.description: Miami-based company Watsco, Inc. (NYSE: WSO) has announced its plans to hold a conference call discussing its first quarter results for 2026 on April 28th at 10:00 a.m. (EDT). This event will feature prepared remarks on the financial outcomes, followed by a session for questions and answers with the senior management team. The conference call will be webcast by CCBN's StreetEvents and can be accessed through a link on the company website at www.watsco.com. The earnings report is scheduled to be released before the market opens on the same day. For those unable to attend the live call, a replay will be made available on the website for later viewing.

data.title: Beneficient Closes $8.75 Million GP Primary Capital Transaction
data.description: Beneficient (NASDAQ: BENF) has successfully completed the funding of an $8.75 million commitment from a fund overseen by Quartus Capital Partners LLC.

data.title: Edison Partners to Sell its Investment in Bindplane to Dynatrace
data.description: Nashville, Tennessee - Edison Partners, a growth equity firm, has recently confirmed the sale of its investment in Bindplane to Dynatrace, a top AI-powered observability platform. The financial details of the agreement have not been disclosed. Bindplane offers an open-standards-based telemetry pipeline allowing organizations to efficiently handle logs, metrics, and traces at larger scales. This move comes as more enterprises are transitioning to cloud-native architectures.

data.title: Omdia: Global Smartphone Market Edges up 1% in 1Q26, Beating Expectations Despite Growing Supply Chain Bottlenecks and Cost Pressures
data.description: In London, new research from Omdia reveals that the global smartphone market exceeded expectations in the first quarter of 2026, experiencing a 1% year-on-year growth. This growth, however, does not fully capture the impact of heightened supply-side expenses. Shipments were temporarily bolstered by vendor inventory frontloading in the channel. Costs for memory and storage are on the rise, with mobile DRAM and NAND prices seeing significant increases. Vendors have yet to apply retail price adjustments universally across markets, signaling potential challenges ahead.

data.title: Beamr Launches VISTA for Subjective Quality Testing at Scale
data.description: The VISTA platform has confirmed that NVIDIA RTX Video Super Resolution offers superior quality compared to standard upscaling through real-viewer testing, with statistical confidence. The findings from this study will be presented at the NAB Show in 2026.

data.title: Scott Bessent, Jerome Powell Quietly Warn Top Wall Street CEOs About Cyber Risks From Anthropic's New AI Model: Report
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell called an urgent meeting this week with the CEOs of the top banks in the country to address cybersecurity concerns related to Anthropic's new AI model. The meeting, held at the Treasury Department in Washington on Tuesday, included CEOs from Citigroup (NYSE: C), Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS), Bank of America (NYSE: BAC), Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC), and Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS). These high-level discussions were reported by Bloomberg on Thursday. JPMorgan was notably absent from the meeting. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
